team.name: social_media
team.header: Team managing Lee's Market's presence on social media platforms
team.purpose: To monitor, analyze and improve Lee's Market's social media performance

channel.name: brand_messaging
channel.header: Channel for discussions on brand messaging across all platforms
channel.purpose: To ensure consistent brand messaging that strengthens Lee’s Market’s reputation in North America

channel.name: instagram_performance
channel.header: Channel for analyzing and discussing Lee's Market's Instagram performance
channel.purpose: To understand trends, follower growth, engagement rates, and quality of content on Instagram

post.message: Good morning team, I'd like to propose a meeting next week to discuss the upcoming promotional campaign for our new product line. Let's brainstorm some effective messaging ideas.
I agree, Andrew. We should also consider how we can highlight our commitment to high-quality products in this campaign.
Hello team, after today's training session, let's have a quick catch-up to discuss the new software tool we are implementing for content scheduling.
Great idea, Jennifer. I've heard good reviews about the software. I think it will help us streamline our content publishing process.
Could we also discuss the customer feedback we received from the last survey? There are some useful insights that could influence our brand messaging.
Absolutely, Andrew. It's important to incorporate customer feedback into our messaging. It shows that we value their opinions.
Just a reminder, we have a performance review meeting scheduled for tomorrow. Please come prepared with your quarterly reports.
Thanks for the reminder, Jennifer. I will have my reports ready.

Hello team, I have some exciting news to share. Our main corporate Instagram account has been performing exceptionally well. We gained over 80,000 new followers in 2022 alone! This is a testament to our engaging content and successful marketing strategies. Let's keep up the good work!
